Serving one of Deira's busiest residential and commercial districts, it provides prescription dispensing, over-the-counter medications, and a broad range of health products. The location benefits from high foot traffic and serves a diverse multinational community. A 4.9 Google rating from 265 reviews marks Al Kanz as one of the most trusted community pharmacies in the Al Muteena area.
reviewSummary: Al Muteena residents consistently rate this pharmacy as the best option in the neighborhood.
Staff knowledge, warmth, and willingness to assist with medication queries earn high praise.
Customers note a well-maintained and well-stocked pharmacy with minimal out-of-stock issues.
Efficient service during busy morning and evening peak hours is highlighted in reviews.
Many reviewers explicitly recommend Al Kanz to others in the Deira area.

338.description: Al Karama Medical Center at Al Quoz branch is a DHA-licensed polyclinic providing multi-specialty outpatient care in the Al Quoz area. The clinic extends the Al Karama Medical Center network into Dubai's mixed industrial and residential district, offering consultations across general practice and select specialties. It serves the working community of Al Quoz as well as nearby residential areas. A 3.3 Google rating from 179 reviews points to a meaningful volume of patient feedback and highlights opportunities for service improvement.
reviewSummary: Some patients appreciate the clinic's accessibility within Al Quoz for basic consultations.
Reviewers frequently cite wait time management and appointment scheduling as areas needing improvement.
Staff attitude and communication are noted inconsistently across the patient review base.
Certain patients mention positive experiences with individual doctors despite operational concerns.
The clinic's multi-specialty offering is recognized as useful for a medically underserved zone.

339.description: Al Karama Medical Fitness Center in Al Karama is a DHA-licensed medical fitness center on Street 25 within the Bena Residence building. Medical fitness centers in Dubai conduct mandatory fitness assessments for residency visa applications, employment medicals, and routine medical checks. Al Karama's location and high resident population make this one of the busiest fitness centers in the city. A 4.8 Google rating from over 5,100 reviews makes this among the most-reviewed DHA facilities in this dataset, reflecting high-volume, high-satisfaction performance.
reviewSummary: Thousands of applicants rate this center for efficient, organized medical fitness processing.
Staff are praised for clearly guiding patients through residency medical requirements step by step.
Customers highlight surprisingly quick turnaround times given the consistently high visitor volumes.
Multilingual staff serving Arabic, English, and South Asian language speakers earn specific praise.
Reviewers note the center as one of the smoothest medical fitness experiences in Dubai.

340.description: Al Karama Optics LLC is a DHA-licensed optical center located in Al Karama within the Mariam Lootah Building in Al Kafaf, one of Dubai's most active mid-market residential and commercial districts. This optical outlet provides prescription eyewear, frame selection, and contact lens services to a high-volume, diverse patient population. Al Karama's large South Asian and Arab resident communities make multilingual optical services particularly valuable, and staff here are equipped for this. A 4.8 Google rating from 650 reviews reflects a strong reputation built over time in a competitive and busy part of the city.
reviewSummary: Al Karama residents rely on this optical center for affordable, accurate prescription eyewear.
Staff multilingual skills in Arabic, English, and South Asian languages receive strong praise.
Customers highlight a wide range of frame styles suited to the area's diverse community.
Fast prescription turnaround and good lens accuracy are consistently mentioned in reviews.
Many reviewers return specifically for the value and service quality relative to price.

341.description: AL Kefaya Pharmacy Dubai Branch is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy serving the Jumeirah Third area, one of Dubai's established beachside residential districts. The pharmacy provides prescription dispensing, over-the-counter medications, and health products for a community of predominantly mid-to-high income families and professionals who live in this low-density residential neighborhood. Jumeirah Third's character as a quiet residential area makes reliable neighborhood pharmacy access a daily priority for local households. A 4.8 Google rating from 136 reviews confirms strong patient satisfaction and trust at this community pharmacy outlet.
reviewSummary: Jumeirah Third residents rely on this pharmacy as a dependable neighborhood health resource.
Staff friendliness and proactive medication guidance are frequently highlighted in reviews.
Customers praise the pharmacy's well-organized layout and comprehensive stock of health products.
Reviewers note quick and accurate prescription dispensing without lengthy wait times.
The pharmacy is valued for filling a key community role in this residential-only district.

342.description: Al Khan Pharmacy is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy located in Al Murqabat, Deira, on Al Maktoum Hospital Road near the Sunshine 2 fish roundabout. Positioned along one of Deira's established healthcare corridors, it provides prescription and over-the-counter medications to the surrounding residential and commercial community. The location on Al Maktoum Hospital Road gives this pharmacy additional relevance for patients who need to fill prescriptions following consultations at nearby health facilities. A 5.0 Google rating from 3 reviews reflects early but uniformly positive patient feedback from the community it serves.
reviewSummary: Patients note helpful and knowledgeable staff who go beyond basic dispensing support.
The location near Al Maktoum Hospital Road makes it convenient for outpatient follow-up prescriptions.
Customers highlight the pharmacy's willingness to assist with medication queries in detail.
Quick dispensing and straightforward service are noted across the small existing review base.
Early reviewers recommend Al Khan Pharmacy to neighbors as a reliable local option.

343.description: Al Khawaneej Medical Center PHC is a DHA-licensed polyclinic in Al Khawaneej Second on Al Khawaneej Road, serving as a primary health center for the eastern residential community of Dubai. As a PHC-designated facility, it provides essential primary care services including general medicine consultations, preventive care, maternal and child health services, and chronic disease management. The center serves a large local community population. A 3.8 Google rating from 172 reviews reflects a broadly satisfactory primary care experience with some service-quality variation.
reviewSummary: Al Khawaneej residents treat this PHC as their first point of contact for family health needs.
Patients praise the accessibility of primary care and availability of general medicine consultations.
Some reviewers note that wait times during busy periods can be a source of frustration.
Chronic disease follow-up services and referral handling receive mixed but generally positive remarks.
Arabic-language service is highlighted as an important asset for the local community.

344.description: Al Khawaneej Pharmacy is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy in Al Khawaneej Second, located in the Kalaf Mattar Alwan building along Alkawaneej Road. Serving the residential community of Al Khawaneej, it provides prescription dispensing, over-the-counter medications, and health products to a largely family-oriented neighborhood with deep roots in eastern Dubai. Arabic-speaking staff provide culturally familiar service to the area's predominantly Emirati and Arab resident population, with English also available. A 4.6 Google rating from 52 reviews reflects solid and growing satisfaction among the pharmacy's regular community clientele.
reviewSummary: Al Khawaneej residents appreciate having a reliable pharmacy within their neighborhood.
Arabic-speaking staff are particularly valued by the area's predominantly Arab community.
Customers note good availability of prescription medications and helpful dispensing advice.
Reviewers highlight a clean, organized pharmacy environment with efficient service.
The pharmacy is considered a trusted community health resource by regular visitors.

345.description: AL Lailak Alabyad General Dental Clinic is a DHA-licensed polyclinic offering dental and general healthcare services in Rega Al Buteen, Deira, from the Al Masood Building on Al Maktoum Street. Serving a dense urban district with a long-established residential character, the clinic provides accessible dental care including general dentistry, restorations, and preventive treatments alongside general medical consultations for the surrounding community. Bilingual staff accommodate the area's diverse Arabic and English-speaking population. A 4.9 Google rating from over 2,100 reviews marks this as one of the highest-rated multi-specialty clinics in this dataset.
reviewSummary: Patients from across Deira specifically seek out this clinic for its dental care reputation.
Dentists are praised for gentle, thorough technique and clear communication about treatment plans.
Reviewers highlight the clinic's ability to handle both dental and general medical needs together.
Short appointment wait times and organized scheduling receive consistent high marks.
Many patients name this clinic as the best in the Deira district based on personal experience.

346.description: AL Liali Ayurvedic Clinic LLC is a DHA-licensed Traditional Complementary and Alternative Medicine facility in Al Barsha First on First Al Khail Street. Offering authentic Ayurvedic treatments including therapeutic massages, panchakarma detox protocols, herbal therapies, and individualized wellness consultations, the clinic serves Dubai's large South Asian community alongside health-conscious residents who seek holistic and non-pharmaceutical approaches to care. Licensed practitioners trained in classical Ayurvedic traditions provide the treatments. A 4.9 Google rating from 244 reviews confirms AL Liali as a well-regarded destination for Ayurvedic healing in Dubai.
reviewSummary: South Asian residents in Dubai praise the clinic for authentic Ayurvedic treatments from trained practitioners.
Customers highlight effective panchakarma and detox therapies for chronic conditions and stress.
Reviewers note the clean, calming clinic environment as appropriate for a wellness facility.
Herbal consultations and personalized treatment plans receive consistently high marks.
Many patients report returning regularly and recommending the clinic within their community.

347.description: Al Lubnani Medical Center LLC Dubai Branch is a DHA-licensed polyclinic located in Al Garhoud, serving a mixed residential and commercial district adjacent to Dubai International Airport. This multi-specialty outpatient clinic offers consultations across general practice and select specialty disciplines for the diverse Garhoud community that includes long-term residents, airport professionals, and nearby business district workers. Bilingual Arabic and English staff accommodate the area's international patient mix. A 4.6 Google rating from 342 reviews confirms reliable multi-specialty care delivery in this consistently active and well-connected district.
reviewSummary: Garhoud residents and airport-area workers value the clinic's accessible location and multi-specialty offering.
Patients praise knowledgeable doctors and organized appointment management.
Reviewers highlight strong general medicine consultations and responsive chronic condition follow-up.
Arabic and English service delivery are both noted as smooth and professional.
The clinic is regarded as a dependable and well-run private polyclinic in the Garhoud area.

348.description: Al Lusaily Medical Center PHC is a DHA-licensed polyclinic functioning as a primary health center in Al Lusaily, serving one of Dubai's outer residential communities along Al Lusaily center road. As a PHC-designated facility, it delivers foundational primary care including general medicine consultations, preventive health programs, maternal and child health services, and specialist referrals for the local population. Residents in this part of the city depend on this center as their main point of access for routine and chronic condition healthcare. A 4.2 Google rating from 84 reviews reflects generally satisfactory primary care provision in an outer residential area.
reviewSummary: Al Lusaily residents appreciate access to primary healthcare without traveling to central Dubai.
Patients note generally adequate wait times and organized appointment processes.
General medicine consultations receive positive feedback for thoroughness and referral quality.
Some reviewers note limited specialist availability and suggest expanded services would be beneficial.
The center is viewed as an important primary care access point for this outer residential community.

349.description: AL Maaref American School LLC operates a DHA-licensed school clinic within Al Maaref Private School in Al Qusais First on Amman Street. School clinics in Dubai provide on-site healthcare support for students, including first aid, routine health monitoring, chronic condition management, immunization oversight, and nurse-led wellness programs that operate in line with DHA school health standards. This clinic serves the full student body and coordinates directly with parents on health-related matters requiring follow-up. A 4.0 Google rating from a single review represents early community feedback from within the school environment.
reviewSummary: Parents appreciate the presence of an on-site DHA-licensed clinic supporting student health needs.
The school clinic's compliance with DHA health standards is noted as a reassuring factor.
First aid availability and nurse presence during school hours are highlighted as practical benefits.
Coordination with parents for medication administration and health monitoring receives positive mention.
A school clinic demonstrates institutional commitment to student health as a core priority.
